display.purpose: Total amounts, settlement totals, day-header dates that must be readable at a glance.

headline.purpose: Page titles (Records, Stats, Settings) and card titles.

title.purpose: List item primary text, form field labels, button copy.

body.purpose: Inline copy, descriptions, secondary text. Cap at 65–75ch.

label.purpose: Metadata, timestamps, tag captions, icon-adjacent text.

shadows.name: app-shell
shadows.purpose: The single allowed elevation. Applies only to the central <main> container that frames the phone-shaped viewport.

shadows.name: focus-ring
shadows.purpose: Keyboard focus indicator on every interactive control. Reproduced by Tailwind's ring-3 ring-ring/50.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default ease-out-quint for all state transitions. Confident exit, no bounce.

motion.name: active-press
motion.purpose: Tactile feedback on button press. No scale, no shadow.

motion.name: scan-sweep
motion.purpose: OCR scanner laser line on the scan page. The single signature animation in the system.

breakpoints.name: phone-shell
breakpoints.purpose: max-w-lg of <main>. The phone-form container that everything lives inside.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single highest-attention action on a screen. Use sparingly per the One Action Color Rule.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); color: var(--color-primary-foreground, #FFFFFF); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; letter-spacing: normal; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), transform 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.9); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.5); border-color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: translateY(1px); } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { pointer-events: none; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Outline Button
components.description: Neutral action paired with a Primary on the same screen. Transparent over the page surface.
components.css: .ds-btn-outline { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-border, #E2E8F0); border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground, #0F172A); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-outline:hover { background: var(--color-muted, #F1F5F9); } .ds-btn-outline:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.5); border-color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); } .ds-btn-outline:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Secondary Button
components.description: Mist-tinted action for the second-tier action when you don't want a transparent outline.
components.css: .ds-btn-secondary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 32px; padding: 0 10px; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: var(--color-secondary, #F1F5F9); color: var(--color-secondary-foreground, #0F172A); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-secondary:hover { background: oklch(96% 0.012 250 / 0.7); } .ds-btn-secondary:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.5); border-color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); } .ds-btn-secondary:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: No-chrome trigger for icon-only actions in toolbars and list rows.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="刪除"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="16" height="16" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M3 6h18"/><path d="M8 6V4a2 2 0 0 1 2-2h4a2 2 0 0 1 2 2v2"/><path d="M19 6l-1 14a2 2 0 0 1-2 2H8a2 2 0 0 1-2-2L5 6"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; width: 32px; height: 32px; padding: 0; border: 1px solid transparent; border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground, #0F172A); cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: var(--color-muted, #F1F5F9); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.5); border-color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { transform: translateY(1px); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Default container. Flat, ring-bordered, no shadow. Used for stats blocks, expense rows, member cards.
components.html:
今日花費
2026 年 4 月 29 日
¥12,480
components.css: .ds-card { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 16px; padding: 16px 0; border-radius: 14px; background: var(--color-card, #FFFFFF); color: var(--color-card-foreground, #0F172A); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(20% 0.04 250 / 0.1); overflow: hidden; font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-card-header { display: grid; gap: 4px; padding: 0 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-size: 16px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; } .ds-card-description { font-size: 14px; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #64748B); } .ds-card-content { padding: 0 16px; } .ds-card-amount { font-size: 24px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.2; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; }

components.name: Input
components.description: Text field with transparent background and a thin Hairline border. Focus brings up the Signal Blue ring.
components.css: .ds-input { display: block; width: 100%; height: 32px; padding: 4px 10px; border: 1px solid var(--color-input, #E2E8F0); border-radius: 10px; background: transparent; color: var(--color-foreground, #0F172A); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.4; outline: none; transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #64748B); } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.5); } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; background: oklch(96% 0.012 250 / 0.5); } .ds-input[aria-invalid="true"] { border-color: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.2); }

components.name: Badge
components.description: Small classifier label for category tags, payment methods, credit-card brand chips.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 8px; background: var(--color-accent, #DBEAFE); color: var(--color-accent-foreground, #1E40AF); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.3; letter-spacing: 0.01em; }

components.name: Bottom Navigation
components.description: Fixed-bottom tab bar with safe-area inset. Selected tab uses Signal Blue text only — no underline, no pill.
components.html: 首頁記錄掃描統計
components.css: .ds-bottom-nav { position: fixed; bottom: 0; left: 0; right: 0; display: flex; max-width: 32rem; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8px 0; padding-bottom: env(safe-area-inset-bottom, 8px); background: var(--color-background, #FFFFFF); box-shadow: inset 0 1px 0 0 var(--color-border, #E2E8F0); font-family: Geist, ui-sans-serif, system-ui, sans-serif; } .ds-bottom-nav-item { flex: 1; display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 2px; padding: 6px 0; color: var(--color-muted-foreground, #64748B); font-size: 11px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.2; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-bottom-nav-item:hover { color: var(--color-foreground, #0F172A); } .ds-bottom-nav-item--active { color: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); }

components.name: Scan Sweep (signature)
components.description: OCR scanner laser line. The only signature animation in the system. Disabled under prefers-reduced-motion.
components.css: .ds-scan-frame { position: relative; width: 100%; aspect-ratio: 3 / 4; border-radius: 14px; overflow: hidden; background: oklch(20% 0.04 250 / 0.04); box-shadow: inset 0 0 0 1px oklch(20% 0.04 250 / 0.1); } .ds-scan-line { position: absolute; inset: 0 0 auto 0; height: 1px; background: var(--color-primary, #2563EB); box-shadow: 0 0 12px 0 oklch(54% 0.21 261 / 0.6); animation: ds-scan-sweep 2.4s linear infinite; } @keyframes ds-scan-sweep { 0% { transform: translateY(-100%); } 100% { transform: translateY(100%); } } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce) { .ds-scan-line { animation-duration: 0.01ms; animation-iteration-count: 1; } }

narrative.overview:
旅帳 是一個 PWA 口袋帳本,給作者本人和少數熟人在日本旅行時用。它不是社交產品、不是觀光紀念,也不是給陌生人看的儀表板。視覺系統圍繞「精準的私人工具」這個核心:單手可操作的窄欄手機畫面、白底襯穩重的板岩字、唯一一個訊號藍主色用來標示動作,其餘一律灰階。

界面的密度由功能驅動 — Records 頁是緊湊的列表、Stats 頁是清晰可掃讀的圖表、Scan 頁是無干擾的拍照流程。每一個元件都有它存在的功能理由,沒有純裝飾的元素。系統明確拒絕花俏記帳 App 的彩色 emoji、典型 SaaS dashboard 的大數字漸層 hero、過度設計的旅遊 App 風景照背景,以及任何 glassmorphism、gradient text、bounce 動畫。
keyCharacteristics: 手機優先的 max-w-lg (32rem) 中央欄位,單手可達的底部固定導覽
白 + 板岩字 + 訊號藍主色,藍色僅出現在主要動作與焦點環
全平面元件 — 用 ring-1 細描邊取代 box-shadow,depth 由顏色深淺與分隔線傳達
Geist 單一無襯線字體系統,無 mono 對比,無 display serif 對比
圓角適中(10–14px),不極端 0,也不極端 999

rules.name: The One Action Color Rule
rules.body: 整個 App 在任何畫面上,Signal Blue 的覆蓋面積不得超過 10%。它的稀有性就是它的意義。

rules.name: The No-True-Black Rule
rules.body: 永遠不用 #000 或 #FFF。Ink Slate (#0F172A) 帶 220 hue,跟 Signal Blue 同色族。

rules.name: Themes Are Optional
rules.body: 系統內建 light(canonical)/ dark / japanese 三主題,但 PRODUCT.md 的視覺基準是 light。

rules.name: The Single Family Rule
rules.body: 全站只用 Geist。對比靠 weight 與 size,不靠 family。禁止為了「設計感」引入 serif display 或 monospace。

rules.name: The Tabular Numbers Rule
rules.body: 所有金額顯示必須開啟 font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums,小數點對齊。

rules.name: The Ring-Not-Shadow Rule
rules.body: Card / Dialog / Popover 的「邊」必須是 ring-1 ring-foreground/10,不准用 shadow-md / lg / xl。陰影只屬於 App Shell 與 focus ring。

rules.name: The Active Press Rule
rules.body: 可點元件按下時用 active:translate-y-px(向下移 1px),不用 scale、不用 shadow。

dos: Do 把 Signal Blue (#2563EB) 當作貴重資源 — 一個畫面只用一處。
Do 用 ring-1 ring-foreground/10 作為 card 邊界,不用 shadow-md。
Do 用 font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums 顯示所有金額。
Do 把主要動作放在拇指可達的下半區(底部 nav、sheet 內底部 CTA)。
Do 用 weight (400/500/600) 與 size (12/14/16/18/24) 拉開字級層次,單一 Geist 字族走到底。
Do 在所有 transition / animation 外層尊重 prefers-reduced-motion: reduce。
Do focus-visible 一律 ring-3 ring-ring/50,不論元件類型。
donts: Don't 像花俏記帳 App — 禁止滿版彩色 emoji、紅綠強對比、農民曆配色、卡通插畫。
Don't 像典型 SaaS dashboard — 禁止大數字 + 漸層底 + 點綴小圖示的 hero metric 模板。
Don't 像過度設計的旅遊 App — 禁止大張風景照填底、漸層 hero、強迫情緒共鳴的標語。
Don't 加 glassmorphism — 禁止 backdrop-blur 作為裝飾性效果。
Don't 用 gradient text(background-clip: text + 漸層底)。emphasis 一律靠 weight 或 size。
Don't 用 bounce / elastic 動畫。easing 用 ease-out exponential。
Don't 用 box-shadow 來「讓 card 浮起」。Flat 是預設。
Don't 用 side-stripe border-left >1px 作為彩色 accent。
Don't 寫 onboarding tutorial 與行銷文案 — 使用者就是熟人。
Don't 用 em dash 在 UI 文案。
Don't 為陌生使用者設計 — 沒有公開註冊轉換漏斗、沒有 referral。
